title: Fundamental Principles of Counting Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart to help determine which fundamental counting principle to apply based on the problem structure.
relationships: Start leads to 'Are tasks performed in sequence?'
'Yes' from sequence question leads to 'Use Multiplication Principle'
'No' from sequence question leads to 'Are choices independent?'
'No' from independent choices leads to 'Use Addition Principle'
'Yes' from independent choices leads to 'Does order matter?'
'Yes' from order question leads to 'Use Permutations Formula'
'No' from order question leads to 'Are objects distinct?'
'Yes' from distinct objects leads to 'Use Combinations Formula'
All principle nodes lead to 'Solution: Apply Formula'
